news.title: New Website Is Up And Running
news.body:
After a long time of failing to update our previous Wix website we have taken the plunge and designed a whole new site!

Expect this to be updated regularly with more news, events and recipes.
Exciting times ahead for the Macedon Ranges Brew Club.

news.title: Stout Extravaganza by Westgate Brewers
news.body:
Get your entries in by 11/07/2026!
See full details in events tab.

news.title: Kyneton Show
news.excerpt: We are back at the Kyneton Show for another year!
news.body:
This year we will also be running a stall in conjunction with Rock & Ranges. More details to come on that closer to the date.
Entries for the competition will be in 6 categories: Pale ales, Dark ales (anything red or darker), Lagers (all lagers under 7%), Strong beers (anything over 7%), Specialty beer (any beer that doesn't fit the other categories, wheat beers, rye beers, fruit beers, sours etc.) and Ciders (all ciders, perries, etc).
Cutoff for entries will likely be Tuesday 17th November with judging on Thursday 19th November.
Lots of great prizes provided by Holgate Brewhouse, BeerCo, Backyard Homebrew Co, Bluestone Yeast and Rock & Ranges.
